creator: walter.von.entferndt@posteo.net
text:
The KDE4 software has a nice bug reporting tool that's able to include a backtrace with debug symbols to help the developers to find the bug.

Thus, it would be great to include an option to include debug symbols throughout the KDE4 software, and turn it on by default.

I did not figure it out how to do that globally.

Thanx in advance!

Fix: 

I guess a ports wizzard shall be able to fix that in 5 minutes.
How-To-Repeat: Use KDE4 and find a bug that crashes an application.  Then the KDE4 bug reporting tool starts automagically, but can not produce a meaningful backtrace.
